sprints.title: Diagnostic & Quantification
sprints.key_findings: Staging fallback rate 33.3% (3/9 completions); all 3 affected incidents share same Zod too_small error on findings[].evidenceIds; tenantId not currently emitted in fallback log line; production log group exists but no worker activity since regression

sprints.title: Pre-Synthesis Gate + Inconclusive Terminal State
sprints.key_findings: Pre-synthesis gate added at investigate-incident.usecase.ts:~1414 with marker 'pre_synthesis_zero_evidence'. Single bounded re-invocation of orchestrator agent on zero evidences; if still zero → terminateInconclusive. Removed unvalidated-fallback path; exhausted-citation retries now route to terminateInconclusive. Added IncidentStatus 'inconclusive' (terminal — no transitions out). Worker bridges investigation.inconclusive → progress SQS. INVARIANTS I9, I10, I11 added (I10 scoped to orchestrator-mode only; legacy multi-agent stringsToFindings path is out-of-scope). Tests: 998/998 pass; lint-invariants 9/9; typecheck/lint clean.

sprints.title: Orchestrator Prompt Hardening + Telemetry
sprints.key_findings: ORCHESTRATOR_SYSTEM_PROMPT in agent-configs.ts strengthened with WILL-BE-DISCARDED + no-fallback contract + worked tool→cite_evidence→finding example. Added telemetry events 'orchestrator_failed_to_cite' and 'orchestrator_reinvocation_succeeded' inside the pre-synthesis gate (avoids extra DB round-trip). Promptfoo eval YAML at tests/eval/promptfoo/orchestrator-cites-evidence.yaml (2 scenarios, not auto-run). All checks: typecheck/lint/test:run/lint-invariants pass.

sprints.title: API Surface + Dashboard Inconclusive UX
sprints.key_findings: Core: GET /v1/incidents/:id passes status through verbatim (no Zod schema enumerates values); only change was extending VALID_STATUSES in incident.routes.ts to include 'aborted', 'failed', and 'inconclusive' (the ?status= filter previously silently dropped these values). Added contract test asserting status=inconclusive in GET response. Web: added IncidentInconclusivePanel component using semantic warning DS tokens (text-warning, bg-warning/10, border-warning/40 — adapts to dark mode), wired into IncidentDetail with isInconclusive branch. Updated en/pt-BR i18n. Status badge + list filter handle the new value. Playwright E2E intentionally not added — the existing E2E setup needs a running dev server; vitest source-guard test covers the structural assertions instead. PR #30 (web) awaits merge after staging deploy.
